\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4876 introduces Backfill Patch Candidates Existing Json Id Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[T^{\mu\nu} = \frac{1}{\mu_0} \left[ F^{\mu\alpha} F^{\nu}_{\phantom{\nu}\alpha} - \frac{1}{4} g^{\mu\nu} F_{\alpha\beta} F^{\alpha\beta} \right]\]
